name: Peanut Butter & Banana Bread
recipeIngredient: 6 oz. Banana, peeled and sliced directly into the inner pan
1 1/3 cups Peanut butter, creamy or chunky
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to white bread settings.
2. Pour all ingredients into the inner pan in the order listed.
3. Push "Start" and allow the bread to auto-bake.
4. For a special treat, toast slices and spread with a mixture of 1 part chocolate sauce to 2 parts peanut butter.
